expected_evidence: Module 3 stability includes 3.2.P.8.1 and 3.2.P.8.3 but intentionally omits 3.2.P.8.2 Post-approval Stability Protocol and Stability Commitment.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify whether 3.2.P.8.2 exists elsewhere or add the post-approval stability protocol and commitment.

expected_evidence: Module 3 says proposed shelf life is 24 months; label says shelf life is 18 months.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify and align shelf-life information between Module 3 and product label.

expected_evidence: Module 3 says Store below 25°C; label says Store below 30°C.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify and align storage condition information between Module 3 and product label.

expected_evidence: QOS states primary commercial stability batch is B003; manufacturing section lists validation batches B001 and B002.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify batch references across QOS, stability, and manufacturing sections.

expected_evidence: QOS lists Apex Pharma Manufacturing Pvt. Ltd.; manufacturing section lists Nova Labs Manufacturing Pvt. Ltd.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify and align manufacturer information across QOS and Module 3.

expected_evidence: Clinical Summary says primary endpoint is systolic blood pressure reduction; CSR says primary endpoint is heart rate reduction.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify the primary endpoint and align Clinical Summary with the CSR.

expected_evidence: Clinical Summary reports 3 serious adverse events; CSR reports 5 serious adverse events.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify serious adverse event counts and align safety reporting.

expected_evidence: CSR intentionally does not include a separate Synopsis section.
expected_reviewer_action: Verify whether a CSR synopsis exists or add the missing synopsis section.

expected_evidence: Label claims rapid control of blood pressure within 24 hours, but the synthetic CSR does not provide matching support for that claim.
expected_reviewer_action: Check whether the rapid control claim is supported by clinical evidence.

expected_evidence: Stability section says the 24-month shelf life is justified based on limited data and gives only brief explanation of trends.
expected_reviewer_action: Review whether the shelf-life justification is adequate and supported by stability data.
